_comment: Minimal end-to-end demo using only stdlib commands.  No real LLM,
no real validator — just enough to show the loop turning.
forge-loop init-config does NOT install a working dispatch;
this file is the simplest config that actually runs end-to-end
on any machine with Python on PATH.

dispatch.template: python -c "import sys; data = sys.stdin.read(); print('FAKE-LLM for edge {eid}: saw', len(data), 'chars of prompt')"

prompt_kwargs.project_intro: You are an autonomous fix agent (this is a forge-loop demo run).
hard_constraints: This is a demo — no real action expected.
